title: Star Balloons, 8Pcs 22Inch Gradient Rainbow Iridescent Foil Explosion Star Balloons, One-Piece Party Decorations for Birthday Baby Shower Bridal Shower Graduation Celebration
features: 【Premium Star Balloons】Includes 8 pieces of 22-inch one-piece explosion star balloons with a stunning gradient rainbow effect; These iridescent foil balloons create a vibrant and eye-catching display for any celebration.

【Durable Aluminum Foil Material】Made from high-quality aluminum foil for long-lasting use; The star balloons maintain their shape and shine throughout your event, providing a memorable decoration solution.

【Versatile Party Decorations】Perfect for birthday parties, baby showers, bridal showers, graduation celebrations, and themed events like rainbow, mermaid, or ice cream parties; Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use.
【Easy Setup and Inflation】Each star balloon features a self-sealing valve for quick inflation with air or helium; No assembly required, saving you time and effort during party preparations.
【Striking Visual Impact】The unique 22-pointed explosion design and iridescent finish create a dazzling effect; These star balloons transform any space into a festive and joyful environment.
